lines.speaker: Old Man Yarlo
lines.text: Oh, that's nice. I used to wander around, back when my legs were better. So long ago.

lines.speaker: Old Man Yarlo
lines.text: That's the trouble with young people these days. Not my boy, though. He's a good boy, always working. That's why he never visits. Run along now, young [man/lady/one].

sections.title: Talking to Old Man Yarlo after the quest

lines.speaker: Old Man Yarlo
lines.text: Hello again, young [man/lady/one]. You really did wonders for my little home. I feel so much happier living here now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's good to hear. Goodbye now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about more things I can do with Construction.
